articles.title: Flashback: A look at previous times Tall Ships have sailed into Boston
articles.description:
1976 marked the first year of Sail Boston.

The post Flashback: A look at previous times Tall Ships have sailed into Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sail Boston began in 1976, celebrating maritime heritage in the city.
Tall Ships events attract thousands of visitors, boosting local tourism and economy.
Upcoming events in 2026 will revive community engagement and cultural pride.

articles.title: Is it ‘the Back Bay’ or just ‘Back Bay’? The answer might surprise you.
articles.description:
When it comes to Boston neighborhoods, using the definite article is far from definitive.

The post Is it ‘the Back Bay’ or just ‘Back Bay’? The answer might surprise you. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explore the debate over naming conventions in Boston's Back Bay neighborhood.
Local historians note variations in usage date back to the 19th century.
Understanding the correct terminology fosters community identity among Boston residents.
